subcodes.first_line: All things have perished and the Face hath appeared from this luminous horizon. We seized the spirits through a word from Our presence, then [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فنت الاشیاء و ظهر الوجه من هذا الافق المبین قد قبضنا الارواح بکلمه من عندنا ثم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital
